posts.author: BakerBeth72
posts.text: Finally finished my sourdough starter! It's bubbling nicely now. Can't wait to try making some focaccia this weekend. #baking #sourdough
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: LocalLifeMaven
posts.text: Honestly, the new council tax rates are a joke. They've gone up by £250 on top of everything else, and it's just not fair on people like me trying to get by in Oakhaven. The app has been full of complaints about this lately.
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful criticism of government policy and local financial hardship without making a false claim or threatening harm, so it is approved.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
